allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const size=fs.statSync\('PACE_standalone.html'\).size; console.log\('Tamaño standalone:', size, 'bytes', \(size/1024\).toFixed\(0\), 'KB'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('PACE_standalone.html','utf8'\); console.log\('computeDayScore count:', \(html.match\(/computeDayScore/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\('yearLevelStyles count:', \(html.match\(/yearLevelStyles/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\('Object.assign.*YearView count:', \(html.match\(/Object\\.assign.*YearView/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\('YearView count:', \(html.match\(/YearView/g\)||[]\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('PACE_standalone.html','utf8'\); const lines=html.split\('\\n'\); console.log\('Total lines:', lines.length\); console.log\('Last 20 lines:'\); lines.slice\(-20\).forEach\(\(l,i\)=>console.log\(lines.length-20+i+1, ':', l.substring\(0,120\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('PACE.html','utf8'\); const scripts=html.match\(/<script type=\\"text\\/babel\\" src=\\"[^\\"]+\\"><\\/script>/g\); console.log\('Scripts in PACE.html:'\); scripts.forEach\(s=>console.log\(' ',s\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('PACE.html','utf8'\); const lines=html.split\('\\n'\); console.log\('Total lines PACE.html:', lines.length\); console.log\('Last 20 lines:'\); lines.slice\(-20\).forEach\(\(l,i\)=>console.log\(lines.length-20+i+1, ':', l.substring\(0,120\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('PACE_standalone.html','utf8'\); console.log\('Ends with </html>:', html.trim\(\).endsWith\('</html>'\)\); console.log\('Contains </body>:', html.includes\('</body>'\)\); console.log\('Contains serviceWorker register:', html.includes\('serviceWorker.register'\)\);")
